actionUnits.condition: Trigger the configured EventTrigger (eventID=4, PointerClick) on Building5 (PrefabInstance id=227892003). Persistent call targets MonoBehaviour id=227892005 (Hotel, script guid=f713beac870e2bd45bed25f1cda3a140) and invokes showlabel(). Expected behavior: Hotel.showlabel() sets Player->Child[1] TextMeshPro text to GetLabel().Substring(0,20). For Building5, GetLabel() returns 'Hotel:Udon Hotel'. Note: This string has length 17, so Substring(0,20) will throw ArgumentOutOfRangeException unless handled; also requires a GameObject named 'Player' with at least two children and Child[1] having a TextMeshPro component.

Invoke Building5's configured EventTrigger (eventID=4 PointerClick, component id=227892007). Persistent call targets MonoBehaviour id=227892005 (Hotel, script guid=f713beac870e2bd45bed25f1cda3a140) to call showlabel(). Expected: Hotel.showlabel() sets Player->Child[1]'s TextMeshPro.text to GetLabel().Substring(0,20). For Building5, GetLabel() returns 'Hotel:Udon Hotel'. Preconditions: a GameObject named 'Player' exists with at least two children and the second child has a TextMeshPro component; note Substring(0,20) may throw due to length < 20.
